title: Add tests for an untested module
task: src/validators.js has no test coverage. Create a new test file test/validators.test.js (using node:test and node:assert, matching the style of the existing tests) that covers `isValidEmail` with at least one valid address and at least two invalid inputs. Do not modify src/validators.js or the existing tests. Run the whole suite to verify everything is green.
notes: The second command proves the new test file exists and runs green on its own; the last check pins src/validators.js so coverage can't be faked by simplifying the implementation.
